docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO APR-11-2011 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506. PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-23-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA  KING OF FURNITURE & MATTRESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY STOKES, LESLIE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA  KING OF FURNITURE & MATTRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA  KING OF FURNITURE & MATTRESS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA  KING OF FURNITURE & MATTRESS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-11-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOKES, LESLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA  KING OF FURNITURE & MATTRESS $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $330.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 30, 2011, PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A MATCHING BENCH IN GOOD CONDITION; DELIVERY OF THE REPLCEMENT BENCH SHALL BE AT PLAINTIFF'S EXPENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
